---
ID: US-OLV-092
Title: Inspect SDR prospect detail
Status: Code Present
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-20
Milestone: Introduce shared OliverDock and upload flows

As a SDR operator
I want a side panel for selected prospect details
So that I can review a prospect without leaving the list

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Selecting a prospect sets selectedProspect.
- [ ] SdrProspectDetail renders sends and approval items for the prospect.
- [ ] The close action clears selectedProspect.
- [ ] Refresh reloads SDR data.

Notes: Queued draft badge and refresh button were added later.
